# GPC — Google Play Console CLI — Full Reference

> Complete technical reference for AI agents and LLMs.
> Compact version: https://yasserstudio.github.io/gpc/llms.txt

---

## Overview

GPC is a TypeScript CLI for the Google Play Developer API v3. It replaces the Play Console web UI and Fastlane supply for CI/CD and automation workflows.

- Install: `npm install -g @gpc-cli/cli`
- Binary: `gpc`
- Version: 0.9.57
- API endpoints covered: 217 (Android Publisher v3 + Play Developer Reporting v1beta1 + Play Custom App Publishing v1)
- Tests: 1,866 (90%+ coverage)
- Licensing: Free to use. Source code is on GitHub.
- Repo: https://github.com/yasserstudio/gpc
- Notable v0.9.56 feature: `gpc enterprise publish` — first Android publishing CLI with Managed Google Play / Play Custom App Publishing API support

---

## Authentication

GPC supports four auth methods:

### 1. Service Account (recommended for CI)
```
gpc auth login --service-account /path/to/key.json
# or via env var
GPC_SERVICE_ACCOUNT=/path/to/key.json gpc status
# or inline JSON
GPC_SERVICE_ACCOUNT='{"type":"service_account",...}' gpc status
```

### 2. OAuth 2.0 (interactive)
```
gpc auth login --oauth
```

### 3. Application Default Credentials
```
gpc auth login --adc
```

### 4. Named Profiles
```
gpc auth login --service-account key.json --profile production
gpc auth login --service-account staging-key.json --profile staging
gpc status --profile staging
```

### Auth Commands
```
gpc auth login      # Authenticate (interactive or --service-account)
gpc auth status     # Show current auth state
gpc auth logout     # Remove stored credentials
gpc auth token      # Print current access token (for debugging)
gpc auth profiles   # List all named profiles
```

---

## Command Tree

```
gpc
  auth         login, logout, status, token, profiles, switch, whoami
  apps         list
  status       [--sections] [--watch] [--since-last] [--all-apps] [--format summary]
  releases     upload, status, promote, rollout (increase/halt/resume/complete), notes (get/set), diff, count
  tracks       list, get, create, update
  listings     get, pull, push, diff, lint, analyze, images (list/upload/delete), availability
  reviews      list, get, reply, analyze, export
  vitals       overview, crashes, anr, startup, rendering, battery, memory, wakeup, lmk, anomalies, compare, compare-versions, errors (search), watch
  subscriptions  list, get, create, update, delete, base-plans (activate/deactivate/delete), offers (list/get/create/update/delete/activate/deactivate), analytics
  one-time-products  list, get, create, update, delete, offers (list/get/create/update/delete)
  iap          list, get, create, update, delete, batch-get, batch-update
  purchases    get, acknowledge, subscription (get/cancel-v2/defer-v2), product (get-v2), voided, orders (get/batch-get)
  pricing      convert
  reports      list, download
  users        list, invite, remove
  grants       list, create, delete, update
  testers      list, add, remove, import, export
  preflight    [scanners] (manifest, permissions, native-libs, metadata, secrets, billing, privacy, policy, size)
  bundle       analyze, compare
  validate     <file> [--track] [--notes]
  publish      <file> [--track] [--rollout]
  doctor       [--fix] [--json]
  init         [--app] [--ci-template]
  diff         [--from] [--to] [--metadata]
  rtdn         status, decode, test
  changelog    [--tag] [--limit] [--all]
  quota        status, usage
  train        start, status, pause, abort
  cache        list, info, clear
  audit        list, search, clear
  feedback     [--title] [--print]
  quickstart   (guided setup)
  migrate      fastlane
  config       init, show, set, delete
  update       [--check] [--force]
  version      [--json]
  docs         [topic] [--list]
  plugins      list, install, remove
  enterprise   list, create
  games        leaderboards, achievements, events
  completion   (bash/zsh/fish)
```

---

## Core Workflow

### gpc status
Everything in Play Console at once — releases, vitals, reviews.
```
gpc status
gpc status --sections releases,vitals
gpc status --days 14
gpc status --watch 60          # Refresh every 60s
gpc status --since-last        # Diff from last run
gpc status --all-apps          # All configured apps
gpc status --format summary    # One-liner output
gpc status --json
```

### gpc publish
End-to-end release: upload + assign track + commit.
```
gpc publish app.aab --track internal
gpc publish app.aab --track beta --notes "Bug fixes"
gpc publish app.aab --track production --rollout 10
gpc publish app.aab --track beta --dry-run
```

### gpc doctor
20 automated checks — diagnoses auth, config, connectivity, and app access.
```
gpc doctor                 # Run all checks
gpc doctor --json          # Structured output for CI
gpc doctor --fix           # Auto-fix what it can
```
Checks: Node.js version, GPC version, CI detection, config file, unknown config keys, service account path, key readability, key age (>90 days warning), token validity, DNS resolution, HTTPS connectivity with latency, API connectivity, app access verification, package name format, conflicting credentials, token cache health, disk space, developer ID format.

---

## Releases

### Upload
```
gpc releases upload <file> [options]     # AAB or APK (auto-detected)
  --track <track>         internal | alpha | beta | production | custom
  --status <status>       completed | inProgress | draft | halted (default: completed)
  --rollout <n>           Staged rollout percentage 1-100
  --notes <text>          Release notes (en-US)
  --notes-dir <dir>       Per-locale notes directory (<dir>/<lang>.txt)
  --notes-from-git        Auto-generate notes from git log
  --copy-notes-from <t>   Copy notes from another track's latest release
  --since <ref>           Git ref to start from (with --notes-from-git)
  --name <name>           Release name
  --mapping <file>        ProGuard/R8 mapping file
  --dry-run               Preview without uploading
```
Supports both AAB and APK. APK uses `edits.apks.upload` endpoint. File size limits: AAB 2 GB, APK 1 GB.

### Status
```
gpc releases status
gpc releases status --track production
gpc releases status --json
```

### Promote
```
gpc releases promote --from internal --to production
gpc releases promote --from beta --to production --rollout 10
gpc releases promote --from internal --to beta --status draft
gpc releases promote --copy-notes-from internal --from internal --to beta
gpc releases promote --dry-run
```

### Rollout Management
```
gpc releases rollout increase --track production --rollout 50
gpc releases rollout increase --track production --rollout 100  # Complete
gpc releases rollout halt --track production
gpc releases rollout resume --track production
gpc releases rollout complete --track production
```

### Release Notes
```
gpc releases notes set --track beta --text "Bug fixes"
gpc releases notes set --track beta --lang de --text "Fehlerbehebungen"
gpc releases notes get --track production
```

### Diff
```
gpc releases diff --from internal --to production
```

---

## Tracks
```
gpc tracks list
gpc tracks get --track production
gpc tracks create --track custom-track
gpc tracks delete --track custom-track
```

---

## Preflight Scanner

9 offline policy scanners for AAB/APK files. Catches rejections before upload.
```
gpc preflight app.aab                            # All 9 scanners
gpc preflight app.aab --fail-on error --json     # CI gate (exit 6 on failures)
gpc preflight manifest app.aab                   # Target SDK, debuggable, exported
gpc preflight permissions app.aab                # 18 restricted permissions
gpc preflight --metadata metadata/android        # Store listing compliance
gpc preflight --source app/src                   # Secrets, billing SDKs, tracking
```
Scanners: manifest, permissions, native-libs, metadata, secrets, billing, privacy, policy, size. Configure with `.preflightrc.json`.

---

## Listings (Store Metadata)

### Pull / Push
```
gpc listings pull --dir metadata/
gpc listings push --dir metadata/
gpc listings pull --dir metadata/ --locale en-US
gpc listings push --dir metadata/ --dry-run
```

### Metadata directory structure (Fastlane compatible)
```
metadata/
  en-US/
    title.txt
    short_description.txt
    full_description.txt
    changelogs/
      <version-code>.txt
  de-DE/
    ...
```

### Images
```
gpc listings images list --locale en-US --type phoneScreenshots
gpc listings images upload --locale en-US --type phoneScreenshots --file screen1.png
gpc listings images delete --locale en-US --type phoneScreenshots --image-id <id>
```
Image types: phoneScreenshots, sevenInchScreenshots, tenInchScreenshots, tvScreenshots, wearScreenshots, icon, featureGraphic, tvBanner

---

## Vitals

### Crash Rate
```
gpc vitals crashes
gpc vitals crashes --threshold 2.0    # Exit code 6 if ≥ 2.0%
gpc vitals crashes --days 14
gpc vitals crashes --json
```

### ANR Rate
```
gpc vitals anr
gpc vitals anr --threshold 0.5
```

### All Vitals
```
gpc vitals list
gpc vitals compare --days 30          # Compare periods
gpc vitals wakeup                     # Excessive wakeups
gpc vitals lmk                        # Low-memory kills
```

### CI Threshold Gating
```
# Exit code 6 if threshold breached — use in CI to halt rollouts
gpc vitals crashes --threshold 1.5 || gpc releases rollout halt --track production
```

---

## Anomalies
```
gpc anomalies list
gpc anomalies list --json
```

---

## Reviews
```
gpc reviews list
gpc reviews list --stars 1-3 --since 7d
gpc reviews list --lang en --translate-to en
gpc reviews list --all                         # Auto-paginate all pages
gpc reviews get <review-id>
gpc reviews reply <review-id> --text "Thanks!"  # Max 350 chars (validated)
gpc reviews export --format csv --output reviews.csv
gpc reviews analyze --since 30d                # Sentiment, topics, keywords
```
Note: Reviews API only returns production reviews from the last 7 days.

---

## Subscriptions
```
gpc subscriptions list
gpc subscriptions get <product-id>
gpc subscriptions create <product-id> [options]
gpc subscriptions update <product-id> [options]
gpc subscriptions delete <product-id>
gpc subscriptions activate <product-id>
gpc subscriptions deactivate <product-id>
gpc subscriptions base-plans list <product-id>
gpc subscriptions base-plans create <product-id> <base-plan-id>
gpc subscriptions offers list <product-id>
gpc subscriptions offers create <product-id> <offer-id>
```

---

## In-App Products (One-time)
```
gpc one-time-products list
gpc one-time-products get <product-id>
gpc one-time-products create <product-id> [options]
gpc one-time-products update <product-id> [options]
gpc one-time-products delete <product-id>
gpc one-time-products activate <product-id>
gpc one-time-products deactivate <product-id>
```

---

## Purchases
```
gpc purchases get <product-id> <token>
gpc purchases acknowledge <product-id> <token>
gpc purchases subscription get <token>
gpc purchases subscription cancel-v2 <token> --type DEVELOPER_CANCELED
gpc purchases subscription defer-v2 <token> --until 2026-12-01
gpc purchases product get-v2 <token>
gpc purchases voided                           # Default: in-app only
gpc purchases voided --type 1                  # Include subscription voids
gpc purchases voided --include-partial-refunds
gpc purchases orders get <order-id>
gpc purchases orders batch-get --ids GPA.1,GPA.2
```

---

## Pricing
```
gpc pricing convert --from USD --amount 9.99
gpc pricing convert --from USD --amount 9.99 --regions all
gpc pricing templates list
```

---

## Reports
```
gpc reports download financial --month 2026-02
gpc reports download financial --month 2026-02 --output report.csv
gpc reports download stats --month 2026-02
gpc reports list
```

---

## Users & Permissions
```
gpc users list --developer-id <id>
gpc users invite user@company.com --developer-id <id> --role ADMIN
gpc users invite user@company.com --developer-id <id> --role RELEASE_MANAGER
gpc users remove user@company.com --developer-id <id>
gpc users grants list --developer-id <id>
gpc users grants add --developer-id <id> --email user@example.com --app com.example.app
```

Roles: ADMIN, RELEASE_MANAGER, GLOBAL_VIEWER, DEVELOPER, GAME_WIZARD

---

## Testers
```
gpc testers list --track beta
gpc testers add --track beta --email tester@example.com
gpc testers remove --track beta --email tester@example.com
gpc testers import --track beta --file testers.csv
gpc testers export --track beta --output testers.csv
```

CSV format: one email per line.

---

## Bundles
```
gpc bundle analyze app.aab
gpc bundle compare app-v1.aab app-v2.aab
gpc bundle compare app-v1.aab app-v2.aab --size-gate 10MB
```

---

## Internal App Sharing
```
gpc internal-sharing upload app.aab
gpc internal-sharing list
```

---

## Device Tiers
```
gpc device-tiers list
gpc device-tiers get --tier <n>
gpc device-tiers set --aab-path app.aab --tier <n>
```

---

## Data Safety
```
gpc data-safety get
gpc data-safety update --file data-safety.json
```

---

## Recovery
```
gpc recovery list
gpc recovery create [options]
gpc recovery deploy <recovery-id>
gpc recovery cancel <recovery-id>
```

---

## Auth
```
gpc auth login
gpc auth logout
gpc auth status
gpc auth token
gpc auth profiles
```

---

## Apps
```
gpc apps list
gpc apps get --app com.example.app
```

---

## Config
```
gpc config get
gpc config set <key> <value>
gpc config set app com.example.myapp
gpc config set profile production
gpc config init
gpc config profiles list
gpc config profiles add <name>
gpc config profiles remove <name>
gpc config profiles use <name>
```

---

## Plugins
```
gpc plugins list
gpc plugins install <plugin>
gpc plugins remove <plugin>
gpc plugins info <plugin>
```

---

## Utility Commands
```
gpc doctor              # Diagnose setup
gpc docs                # Open documentation
gpc docs --search <q>   # Search docs
gpc completion          # Shell completion (bash/zsh/fish)
gpc version             # Show version
gpc version --json      # Machine-readable version
gpc update              # Self-update
gpc update --check      # Check for updates (CI-friendly, no update)
gpc cache list          # Show cached data
gpc cache clear         # Clear all cached data
gpc feedback            # Open GitHub issues
gpc changelog           # Show release history
gpc changelog --tag v0.9.50    # Details for a specific release
gpc init                # Scaffold .gpcrc.json, metadata dirs, CI templates
gpc diff                # Release status across all tracks
gpc diff --from internal --to production  # Compare two tracks
gpc quota status        # API quota usage
```

### RTDN (Real-Time Developer Notifications)
```
gpc rtdn status                           # Check Pub/Sub topic config
gpc rtdn decode <base64-payload>          # Decode notification payload
gpc rtdn test                             # Setup instructions
```

---

## Migrate

### From Fastlane
```
gpc migrate fastlane --dir fastlane/metadata
gpc migrate fastlane --dir fastlane/metadata --dry-run
```

### Mapping (Fastlane → GPC)
```
Fastlane supply upload         → gpc publish
Fastlane supply               → gpc listings pull / push
Fastlane supply --track beta  → gpc releases upload --track beta
```

---

## Global Flags (all commands)

```
--app <package>      Override package name
--profile <name>     Use named auth profile
--json               JSON output
--output <format>    table | json | yaml | markdown
--dry-run            Preview without side effects
--verbose            Verbose logging
--no-color           Disable ANSI color
--yes                Skip confirmation prompts
```

---

## CI/CD Integration

### GitHub Actions
```yaml
- name: Upload to Google Play
  env:
    GPC_SERVICE_ACCOUNT: ${{ secrets.GPC_SERVICE_ACCOUNT }}
    GPC_APP: com.example.myapp
  run: |
    npm install -g @gpc-cli/cli
    gpc releases upload app.aab --track internal
    gpc vitals crashes --threshold 2.0
    gpc releases promote --from internal --to production --rollout 10
```

### Exit Code Gating
```bash
gpc vitals crashes --threshold 1.5
if [ $? -eq 6 ]; then
  echo "Crash rate too high — aborting rollout"
  gpc releases rollout halt --track production
  exit 1
fi
```

### JSON Output for Parsing
```bash
STATUS=$(gpc releases status --json)
VERSION=$(echo $STATUS | jq -r '.releases[0].versionCode')
```

---

## Environment Variables

| Variable | Description | Default |
|----------|-------------|---------|
| GPC_SERVICE_ACCOUNT | Service account JSON string or file path | — |
| GPC_APP | Default package name | — |
| GPC_PROFILE | Named auth profile | — |
| GPC_DEVELOPER_ID | Developer account ID | — |
| GPC_OUTPUT | Output format | auto |
| GPC_NO_COLOR | Disable color | — |
| GPC_NO_INTERACTIVE | Disable prompts | auto in CI |
| GPC_MAX_RETRIES | Max retry attempts | 3 |
| GPC_TIMEOUT | Request timeout (ms) | 30000 |
| GPC_DEBUG | Debug logging | — |
| GPC_CA_CERT | Custom CA certificate path | — |
| HTTPS_PROXY | HTTP proxy | — |
| NO_COLOR | Standard no-color | — |

---

## Exit Codes

| Code | Name | Meaning |
|------|------|---------|
| 0 | Success | Command completed |
| 1 | Error | General / unexpected error |
| 2 | Usage | Bad arguments or flags |
| 3 | Auth | Authentication failure |
| 4 | API | Google Play API error |
| 5 | Network | DNS, timeout, proxy error |
| 6 | Threshold | Vitals metric exceeded threshold |
| 10 | Plugin | Plugin load or runtime error |

---

## SDK Usage (@gpc-cli/api)

```typescript
import { createApiClient } from '@gpc-cli/api';
import { resolveAuth } from '@gpc-cli/auth';

const auth = await resolveAuth({
  serviceAccountPath: './service-account.json',
});
const client = createApiClient({ auth });

// Open an edit session to read/write app data
const edit = await client.edits.insert('com.example.app');
const tracks = await client.tracks.list('com.example.app', edit.id);
const listings = await client.listings.list('com.example.app', edit.id);
await client.edits.delete('com.example.app', edit.id);

// Direct API calls (no edit needed)
const reviews = await client.reviews.list('com.example.app');
const subs = await client.subscriptions.list('com.example.app');
```

---

## Plugin Development (@gpc-cli/plugin-sdk)

```typescript
import { definePlugin } from '@gpc-cli/plugin-sdk';

export const plugin = definePlugin({
  name: 'my-plugin',
  version: '1.0.0',
  register(hooks) {
    hooks.beforeCommand(async (ctx) => { /* ... */ });
    hooks.afterCommand(async (ctx, result) => { /* ... */ });
    hooks.onError(async (ctx, error) => { /* ... */ });
    hooks.beforeRequest(async (req) => { /* ... */ });
    hooks.afterResponse(async (req, res) => { /* ... */ });
  },
});
```
6 lifecycle hooks: beforeCommand, afterCommand, onError, beforeRequest, afterResponse, registerCommands.

---

## Error Codes (typed errors)

All errors include a code, message, and suggestion. Common codes:

| Code | Exit | Meaning |
|------|------|---------|
| UNAUTHENTICATED | 3 | No credentials found |
| PERMISSION_DENIED | 3 | SA lacks required permissions |
| API_FORBIDDEN | 4 | 403 from Google Play API |
| API_NOT_FOUND | 4 | App/resource not found |
| API_RATE_LIMITED | 4 | Too many requests |
| API_EDIT_EXPIRED | 4 | Edit session expired |
| RELEASES_USAGE_ERROR | 2 | Bad releases command args |
| STATUS_USAGE_ERROR | 2 | Bad status command args |
| VITALS_USAGE_ERROR | 2 | Bad vitals command args |
| REVIEWS_USAGE_ERROR | 2 | Bad reviews command args |
| THRESHOLD_BREACH | 6 | Vitals threshold exceeded |
| NETWORK_ERROR | 5 | DNS/connectivity failure |

---

*Generated from GPC v0.9.50 documentation.*
*Source: https://github.com/yasserstudio/gpc*
